backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining types for booking sessions, user profiles, flights, accommodations, packages, search results, and analytics; includes authorization mixin, persistent state for API keys, search history, user profiles, currency mappings, and user analytics with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that adds userAnalytics field (Map of Principal to BookingSession lists) to the actor state while preserving existing fields like apiKey, userSearchHistory, anonymousSearchHistory, userProfiles, and currencyMapping.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including admin panel with username/password auth, analytics dashboard displaying user interaction data, Indian domestic travel route support with 10 airports, and associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing setup, React Query hooks, pages (landing, chat, trip summary, admin), components (header, footer, cards, autocomplete, tables), utilities (currency formatting, duration), and authentication hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes using warm travel theme colors (orange, coral, amber) for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, cards, and charts.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, 'Trip Craft' title, root div for React mounting, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component using TanStack Router with routes for landing page, chat, trip summary, admin panel, admin settings, booking confirmation, and booking success; includes Header, Footer, and Toaster in layout.
frontend/src/components/AccommodationCar: Card component displaying accommodation details including name, star rating, address, amenities badges, and price per night with multi-currency support using formatCurrency utility.
frontend/src/components/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login form component with username/password fields that validates credentials via a mutation hook and calls onLoginSuccess callback upon successful authentication.
frontend/src/components/AirportAutocompl: Autocomplete input component for searching and selecting airports/cities with keyboard navigation, local filtering from cities data, and visual validation feedback.
frontend/src/components/AnalyticsSummary: Dashboard summary cards displaying key metrics from booking sessions: total sessions, initial satisfaction rate, Sarah AI engagement rate, and booking conversion rate.
frontend/src/components/AnalyticsTable.t: Data table component displaying detailed booking session records with columns for user info, route, price, satisfaction flags, and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/CityAutocomplete: Autocomplete input for city selection with local filtering, keyboard navigation, and optional backend city validation for departure or destination types.
frontend/src/components/CostBreakdown.ts: Card component displaying itemized cost breakdown for flights and accommodation with per-person/per-night calculations and total cost summary.
frontend/src/components/FlightCard.tsx: Card component displaying flight details including airline, flight number, departure/arrival times, duration, route, and price per person.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying Trip Craft branding, quick links (About, Contact, Privacy, Terms), social media icons (X, Facebook, Instagram), and copyright notice with a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component with sticky navigation bar containing Trip Craft logo and navigation buttons (Home, Chat, Admin Panel) that highlight the active route using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/ItineraryTimelin: Timeline component displaying departure flight, hotel stay, and return flight details with formatted dates and visual icons in a vertical layout.
frontend/src/components/PackageCard.tsx: Card component displaying complete travel package details including flight information (airline, duration, times), accommodation details (hotel, amenities), pricing breakdown, and a select button with optional added amenities display.
frontend/src/components/SarahChatPopup.t: Chat popup component featuring Sarah AI assistant that detects user intent, suggests amenities based on keywords, handles package upgrades, and manages conversation flow with backend integration for travel package customization.
frontend/src/components/SatisfactionPopu: Modal dialog component displaying a satisfaction survey with Yes/No buttons (thumbs up/down icons) to collect user feedback on travel packages.
frontend/src/components/SearchHistoryTab: Table component displaying flattened search history data with sortable columns (timestamp, departure, destination), user principal IDs, travel dates, traveler count, and budget information with anonymous user detection.
frontend/src/data/cities.ts: Defines a City interface and exports an array of cities with airport codes, covering major cities in USA, India, Canada, Mexico, South America, Europe, Asia, Middle East, Africa, and Oceania.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, initializes access control with an admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Simple admin authentication hook that manages authentication state with isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated, isAdmin, and isLoading properties.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and provider for React, managing login/logout flows, identity state, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for backend operations including travel search, AI responses, search history, user profiles, admin validation, and booking analytics using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color tokens for UI components with a warm orange/coral color scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays booking analytics with summary statistics and detailed table, requiring authentication via AdminLogin component before showing data.
frontend/src/pages/AdminSettings.tsx: Admin settings page for configuring Travelpayout API key, protected by AdminLogin authentication. Includes form to save API key with success/error handling and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmation.t: Booking confirmation page that displays selected travel package details (flight, hotel, amenities) from URL search params and allows user to confirm the booking. Validates params and shows error alerts if data is missing.
frontend/src/pages/BookingSuccess.tsx: Success page displayed after booking completion, showing a confirmation message with next steps and buttons to return home or plan another trip.
frontend/src/pages/ChatInterface.tsx: Full chat interface page for conversing with Sarah AI assistant. Manages message history and uses useGetSarahResponse mutation to fetch AI responses.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Main landing page with hero section and travel search form. Collects departure/destination cities, dates, and traveler count, then navigates to TripSummary with search params.
frontend/src/pages/TripSummary.tsx: Displays travel package search results with satisfaction popups and Sarah AI chat integration. Manages user satisfaction flow, amenity additions, and booking conversion tracking with Internet Identity integration.
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Formats numeric amounts as currency strings with support for USD, INR, GBP, AED, SGD, and EUR using Intl.NumberFormat with appropriate locale conventions.
frontend/src/utils/formatDate.ts: Provides utility functions to format dates, times, durations (minutes to hours/minutes), and nanosecond timestamps into human-readable strings using Intl.DateTimeFormat.
frontend/src/utils/keywordMatcher.ts: Detects user intent categories (beach, romantic, adventure, local) from text input using keyword matching and returns corresponding amenity suggestions for each category.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and functions to clear sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar, chart, orange, and coral color variants, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a travel booking research application with admin panel, AI chatbot (Sarah), Indian domestic routes, and analytics tracking for user satisfaction metrics before/after AI interaction.
